_comment: IGLA RACE formal proofs metadata — trinity-clara/proofs/igla/

admitted_budget.justification: phi_pow_to_lucas requires Coq.Interval for numerical induction over R. Standard practice. Raised from 3 to 4 per general's review.

admitted_lemmas.name: phi_pow_to_lucas
admitted_lemmas.reason: Real induction over phi^(2n): requires interval arithmetic or Coq.Interval. Structurally necessary to anchor PHI:f64 to lucas_even:Z.
admitted_lemmas.close_with: Require Import Coq.Interval.Tactic. Proof. intro n; induction n; [simpl; lra | ...]. Qed.

admitted_lemmas.name: entropy_band_valid
admitted_lemmas.reason: Upper bound requires ln(9)/ln(2) bounds. Closed by: interval. Qed.

admitted_lemmas.name: alpha_phi_numerical
admitted_lemmas.reason: phi^(-3)/2 numerical bound. Closed by: interval. Qed.

falsification_protocol.description: Each INV file contains a Lemma *_falsification_is_contradiction proving the invariant violation implies False

dual_band_separation.note: Runtime uses certified [phi, phi^2]. Empirical [1.5, 2.8] is the outer safety margin.

compliance.nasa_rule_5: assert >= 2 per pub fn in invariants.rs
